description_long: This is a rugged, vintage-style SUV with a weathered blue and red paint job, featuring a prominent white star on the hood, reminiscent of military vehicles. The body is boxy with exposed wheel arches and oversized, deeply treaded off-road tires, including a spare mounted on the rear. The open cabin has two seats with red frames, a simple dashboard, and a steering wheel, while the windshield is upright and framed in blue. The front grille is vertical with red accents, and the headlights are square and mounted on the fenders. A red jerry can is attached to the rear, adding to its utilitarian appearance. The vehicle's surfaces show signs of rust and wear, suggesting heavy use and durability.
description: A weathered, military-style blue and red SUV with oversized off-road tires, open cabin, and a white star on the hood. Features include a rear spare tire, red jerry can, and visible signs of rust and wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertical red grille, white star on the hood, square headlights, and large off-road tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cabin, red seat frames, large wheel arches, and the spare tire mounted at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire, red jerry can, and the open cargo area behind the seats.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the open cabin, dashboard, steering wheel, and the rugged tire design.
attribute_wheel_design: Red rims with 8 thick spokes and deep off-road tread pattern
